items.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH): Reassessing Valuation After Operational Overhaul, Margin Pressure and Upcoming 2026 Updates
items.description: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) is back in the spotlight after external audits pushed management to overhaul operations in its health services and pharmacy benefit units, a material shift that could reshape margins and long term earnings power. See our latest analysis for UnitedHealth Group. That overhaul comes after a bruising stretch where operational missteps and higher claims helped drive a roughly 34 percent drop in the 1 year total shareholder return, even as the latest share price has...

items.title: Don't Buy UnitedHealth Group Stock Before Jan. 27
items.description: There's a lot of grey area surrounding UnitedHealth's business right now.

items.title: How Trump Moved Stocks In 2025: Crypto, Drones, Health Care Sectors
items.description: President Donald Trump moved several sectors by aggressively deregulating emerging technologies while simultaneously shielding domestic manufacturers from global competition in 2025.
